_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Engineering Documentation Product Drawings, Modified (Maintenance)
summary: This Data Item Description provides requirements for Engineering Documentation Product Drawings, Modified, to support prototype and limited production of equipment and systems, essential for maintenance, repair, and configuration baseline management.
use_relationship:
a. To provide Engineering Documentation Product Drawings, Modified, to support prototype and limited production of equipment and systems. The drawings shall be used to support the maintenance, repair, spare procurement, training, testing, and configuration baseline of the equipment and system acquired.
b. For purposes of this Data Item Description (DID), “modified” is defined as an overall design, excluding mechanical fabrication drawings and mounting hardware (i.e., nuts and bolts).
c. This DID contains suggested guidance for the format and content preparation instructions of the Engineering Documentation Product Drawings resulting from the work task described in the contract SOW.
d. It is not intended that the recommendations contained herein should be applied to every program. This DID should be tailored to the minimum data requirements of the applicable contract.
e. This DID supersedes DI-DRPR-81681.

references.label: the American Society of Mechanical Engineers

distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference Documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents and procedure cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revision shall be as stated herein. The ASME Standard, Y14.100-2013, Engineering Drawing Practices, is available through the American Society of Mechanical Engineers (http://www.asme.org). Further guidance can be obtained through the National Security Agency, Aquisition Logistics and Deployment Review, 9800 Savage Road, Suite 6129, Fort Meade, MD 20755-6129, Attn: B-023.

preparation_instructions.title: General.
preparation_instructions.content: Drawings shall meet either the ASME Y14.100-2013 Standard or best business practices, as defined by the customer's engineering drawing and documentation resources.

preparation_instructions.title: Format and Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The following shall be noted on the drawing:

children.title: Each separate type of drawing in the system shall contain a drawing reference number.
Unclassified System Name and/or Rack Name shall be shown.
Date, drafter point of contact and government point of contact information.
Each drawing shall be labeled with a general description (e.g., Rack Elevation, Interconnect Diagram, Cabling List, Power, Parts List, etc).
Number of sheets shall be shown (Sheet X of X on first sheet and individual sheet number on continuing sheets).
Page Size (ex: A-size, B-size, D-size, etc.).
Front and back of rack shown.
Each part in the rack shall be identified (Manufacturer, Model, Part Number, etc.).
Location of equipment in rack (unit numbering method or location numbering method).
Open or blank spaces in racks shall be identified.
Note "FOR PROVISIONING/MAINTENANCE PURPOSES ONLY. NOT FOR REPROCUREMENT" shall be included on drawing.
